calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-14-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant All American Rentals, Inc. A California Corporation d/b/a Craftsmen Tool Rental.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:46 a.m.

Steven Alfred Booska, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Kaeser Compressors, Inc.
Janet Roberts, Credit and Collections Manager for plaintiff Kaeser Compressors, Inc. also the Custodian of Records was present, placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Booska and Ms. Roberts appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant All American Rentals, Inc. A California Corporation d/b/a Craftsmen Tool Rental.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts was filed April 16, 2020.
Substitute Service on defendant All American Rentals, Inc.'s agent of Process on December 22, 2020 and effectuated on January 2, 2021.
Default on All American Rentals, Inc. entered on February 16, 2020.
There were no DOE defendants.

Plaintiff Kaeser Compressors, Inc. submits to the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1 Invoice No. 912566600 Dated 6/29/2018 for $36,650.00.......ID/EVID
Exhibit 2 Account Profile Form Dated 5/9/2018........................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Kaeser Compressors, Inc., and against defendant All American Rentals, Inc., A California Corporation d/b/a Craftsmen Tool Rental., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $36,650.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,572.12.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $608.00.
Total - $50,655.12.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

The parties STIPULATE to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings conclude at 9:59 a.m.
